positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a curious fox peering from behind large stylized botanical leaves and delicate jungle vines. The fox has a clean, elegant silhouette and is rendered in a continuous single-line drawing style. Background negative space is emphasized, suggesting a vertical tapestry or clothing print. Composition must be central and balanced. Deep emerald green and terracotta orange color palette with crisp black linework. High contrast, intricate detail, suitable for apparel screen printing, vector quality, graphic novel style, crisp edges, flat graphic design.
